$description: Captured 1:1 from components/ui/label/label.tsx. Single-slot component — no variants.

lineHeight.$description: leading-none — unitless, no leading token matches.

optionalFontSize.$description: The optional marker reads smaller and lighter than the label itself.

requirementGap.$description: Gap between the label text and its required/optional marker — 4px, HALF of label.gap (8px). The marker is part of the label, not a separate item beside it; label.gap still spaces real siblings (a slotted icon).
